gaps: The ranged corpus backend was unreachable because its object-store hostname did not resolve, so no similar resolved priors were available.
The provisioned snapshot identifies supplemental briefs but does not include their text; those filings may explain the unusually long conference history.
helpful: The provisioned petition, brief in opposition, and questions presented supplied both sides' vehicle and merits arguments.

notes: The corpus query was attempted but returned no priors. CourtListener searches were bounded and did not seek the pending case's outcome.
